steps.title: Use the vertical angle first
steps.content: The angle vertical to $y$ also has measure $y$. That vertical angle is the same-side interior angle paired with $x$ on the parallel lines.

steps.title: Apply the same-side interior angle rule
steps.content: Same-side interior angles formed by parallel lines are supplementary, so $$x+y=180^{\circ}.$$ Since $y\lt65^{\circ}$, $$x=180^{\circ}-y\gt180^{\circ}-65^{\circ}=115^{\circ}.$$
